Power Augmentation.flavor: Structural supports and actuators are strengthened, allowing the frame to safely handle greater force output during attacks.

Precision Augmentation.flavor: Micro-adjustments to the frame's balance points and targeting hardware reduce mechanical drift, ensuring more consistent alignment during fine motor tasks.

Swiftness Augmentation.flavor: Nonessential mass is removed and motion systems are refined, allowing faster transitions between movement states without compromising frame integrity.

Resilience Augmentation.flavor: Critical components are shielded with improved materials and impact-absorbing mounts, increasing the frame's tolerance to sustained damage and stress.

Fortune Augmentation.flavor: The frame is retrofitted with predictive microcontrollers, subtly adjusting timing and execution order to increase the chance that actions resolve favorably under uncertain conditions.

Blades Flash Training.flavor: Rapid implantation of close-quarters engagement heuristics for edged weapons. The Neural Cloud is loaded with optimized distance control, strike sequencing, and pressure-maintenance routines derived from recorded combat data.

Exotic Weapons Flash Training.flavor: Specialized handling schemas for unconventional weapon systems are integrated into the Neural Cloud. This training focuses on safe operation, activation timing, and compensating for nonstandard balance or recoil profiles.

Explosives Flash Training.flavor: The Neural Cloud receives calibrated models for blast radius prediction, fuse timing, and placement logic. This allows precise use of explosive devices with reduced setup errors and improved battlefield shaping.

Firearms Flash Training.flavor: Marksmanship routines are reinforced through recoil compensation patterns, reload sequencing, and threat-priority targeting logic. Performance remains consistent even under stress or degraded conditions.

Hand-To-Hand Flash Training.flavor: Close-combat movement libraries and grappling response trees are implanted. The Doll gains refined control over balance, leverage, and counters in unarmed engagements.

Tactics Flash Training.flavor: Real-time battlefield reasoning models are reinforced. This training improves threat evaluation, squad positioning logic, and adaptive planning when conditions shift unexpectedly.

Conditioning Flash Training.flavor: Physical performance limiters are recalibrated in the Neural Cloud. This training optimizes stamina management, movement efficiency, and exertion pacing in demanding environments.

Resolve Flash Training.flavor: Mental stability frameworks are strengthened through stress-response conditioning. This improves resistance to panic states, coercive influence, and hostile signal intrusion.

Crafting Flash Training.flavor: Procedural knowledge for repair, modification, and improvisation is directly implanted. The Doll gains immediate familiarity with tool use, material substitution, and field-expedient construction.

Insight Flash Training.flavor: Behavioral analysis patterns are reinforced, improving recognition of subtle changes in tone, posture, and intent. This training enhances interpersonal awareness without requiring extended observation.

Stealth Flash Training.flavor: Movement optimization and concealment heuristics are refined. The Neural Cloud emphasizes noise reduction, exposure timing, and exploitation of environmental blind spots.

Survival Flash Training.flavor: Environmental adaptation models are loaded, covering hazard recognition, scavenging priorities, and shelter logic. This training improves decision-making in unstable or resource-poor regions.

Computers Flash Training.flavor: Digital intrusion and system navigation routines are implanted. This includes encryption handling, access escalation logic, and rapid interface comprehension across unfamiliar platforms.

Mechanics Flash Training.flavor: Mechanical system schematics and repair workflows are integrated. The Doll gains immediate competence in disassembly, calibration, and restoration of physical hardware.

Medicine Flash Training.flavor: Medical assessment and treatment protocols are reinforced. This training focuses on injury prioritization, stabilization techniques, and efficient use of limited medical supplies.

Piloting Flash Training.flavor: Vehicle control models and emergency response routines are loaded into the Neural Cloud. This improves handling precision, reaction timing, and situational awareness during operation.

Science Flash Training.flavor: Analytical frameworks for experimentation and data interpretation are implanted. This training improves hazard analysis, material identification, and sensor data evaluation.

Subterfuge Flash Training.flavor: Covert mechanical manipulation routines are reinforced. The Doll gains refined capability in lock interaction, trap handling, and discreet system interference.

Arts Flash Training.flavor: Creative process frameworks and stylistic references are implanted. This training improves the Doll's ability to produce, analyze, and interpret artistic works.

Command Flash Training.flavor: Authority projection and directive framing routines are reinforced. This training enhances compliance generation and unit cohesion under pressure.

Culture Flash Training.flavor: Linguistic, historical, and social-context datasets are integrated. This allows rapid adaptation to unfamiliar communities and interpretation of symbolic behavior.

Deception Flash Training.flavor: Misleading communication models are implanted. This training improves consistency in false narratives, controlled information release, and signal manipulation.

Negotiation Flash Training.flavor: Dialogue optimization frameworks are reinforced. This training improves bargaining position assessment, concession timing, and conflict de-escalation strategies.

Performance Flash Training.flavor: Persona maintenance and behavioral consistency routines are implanted. This allows the Doll to sustain convincing roles, disguises, or public-facing presentations without error.

Electronic Warfare Suite.flavor: Dedicated signal processing hardware and an expanded exploit library are integrated directly into the frame's Neural Cloud interface, tuning its offensive and support capabilities for active network operations.

Hardened Encryption Module.flavor: Advanced encryption protocols and intrusion-detection countermeasures are layered into the frame's network stack, hardening it against unauthorized access and signal exploitation.
Hardened Encryption Module.description:
Effects

  • Increases Security Rating by 1, raising the TN for hostile EW actions targeting her systems.

Vigilance Enhancer.flavor: Sensor arrays are recalibrated and expanded, sharpening passive threat detection across all active input channels. Peripheral awareness improves, reducing the gap between stimulus and recognition.

Focus Amplifier.flavor: Sustained-task processing is restructured to reduce interrupt latency and prioritize deep execution states. The frame maintains concentrated attention longer before fatigue-driven degradation sets in.

Subdermal Ballistic Material.flavor: Layers of impact-resistant composite are implanted beneath the outer chassis shell. The addition is invisible from the outside, but meaningfully increases the force required to breach the frame.
Subdermal Ballistic Material.description:
Effects

  • Increases your armor value by 1. This bonus stacks with any equipped armor.

Radiation Shielding Module.flavor: Lead-composite shielding and neural isolation systems are integrated into the frame's internal cavity, reducing the rate at which collapse radiation accumulates in the Doll's systems during extended field operations in contaminated zones.
Radiation Shielding Module.description:
Effects

  • Reduces your effective Collapse Zone exposure tier by 1 for all mechanical purposes. This cannot reduce your exposure below 0.

Olfactory Unit.flavor: A compact scent-detection array is installed, granting the frame a functional sense of smell. This allows the Doll to perceive and react to olfactory stimuli in ways that were previously impossible.
Olfactory Unit.description:
Effects

  • You may take Passions related to food, drink, scent, or taste. Without this unit, such Passions are unavailable to T-Dolls.

Locomotive Booster.flavor: The hip actuators and thrust-distribution systems are rebuilt for rapid lateral repositioning. Free movement feels almost effortless, until the increased power draw makes itself known.
Locomotive Booster.description:
Effects

  • When you take a free movement action, you may move 2 range bands instead of 1.

Remolding Unit.flavor: A Remolding Unit is a highly experimental implant that channels ambient collapse radiation to bend reality. Each unit can hold only a single technique — the hardware is specialized, not general-purpose. Unpredictable and dangerous, these modules are the domain of those willing to risk everything for a chance at power beyond imagination.
Remolding Unit.description:
Effects

  • Allows you to use Remolding techniques.
  • The unit holds exactly one Remolding technique. It comes installed with a rank 1 technique of your choice at no additional XP cost.
  • Upgrading the held technique to rank 2 or rank 3 costs 5 XP and requires your Fortification to be at least equal to the new rank.
  • A T-Doll may normally install only one Remolding Unit. Installing a second unit requires paying the full installation cost (60,000 URNC Credits) plus an additional 24 XP, or receiving explicit GM permission.

Overclocking Unit.flavor: Core systems are overclocked, pushing the frame beyond its original limits, but also increasing the risk of critical failure.
Overclocking Unit.description:
Effects

  • You may take one additional advantage from the list of advantages at the cost of one additional disadvantage.

Trauma Buffer.flavor: Dense composite layers and reactive hydraulic dampeners are fitted across the frame's most vulnerable structural junctions. The result is a chassis that absorbs the worst of any impact before it reaches the systems underneath.
Trauma Buffer.description:
Effects

  • Whenever you suffer a critical strike, reduce its severity by 2 before applying any other reductions.
